filter.name: activities_overdue
filter.help: Show all records whose next activity date is past

button.name: action_print_pdf
button.invisible: state != 'posted' or is_being_sent or invoice_pdf_report_id or move_type in ('entry', 'in_invoice','in_refund','in_receipt')

button.name: action_print_pdf
button.invisible: state != 'posted' or (not is_being_sent and not invoice_pdf_report_id) or move_type in ('in_invoice','in_refund','in_receipt')

button.name: action_register_payment
button.invisible: ( state != 'posted' or payment_state not in ('not_paid', 'partial', 'in_payment') or move_type not in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'in_invoice', 'in_refund', 'out_receipt', 'in_receipt') or invoice_has_outstanding )

button.name: action_register_payment
button.invisible: ( state != 'posted' or payment_state not in ('not_paid', 'partial', 'in_payment') or move_type not in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'in_invoice', 'in_refund', 'out_receipt', 'in_receipt') or not invoice_has_outstanding )

button.name: preview_invoice
button.title: Preview invoice
button.invisible: move_type not in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund') or state in ('draft', 'cancel')

button.name: action_cancel
button.invisible: not id or state != 'draft' or move_type != 'entry'

button.name: action_cancel
button.invisible: not id or state != 'draft' or move_type == 'entry'

button.name: button_hash
button.invisible: not restrict_mode_hash_table or inalterable_hash or state != 'posted'

button.name: button_request_cancel
button.invisible: state != 'posted' or show_reset_to_draft_button or not need_cancel_request

div.class: d-flex alert alert-danger w-100 d-flex align-items-center gap-1
div.span: This document might be a duplicate of

button.name: action_delete_duplicates
button.class: btn btn-link text-danger ms-auto d-flex align-items-center gap-1

div.class: d-flex alert alert-warning w-100 d-flex align-items-center gap-1
div.invisible: not duplicated_ref_ids or is_exact_move_duplicate or state != 'draft'
div.span: This document might be a duplicate of

button.name: action_delete_duplicates
button.class: btn btn-link text-danger ms-auto d-flex align-items-center gap-1

div.invisible: state != 'posted' or move_type not in ('out_invoice', 'out_receipt') or not invoice_has_outstanding or payment_state not in ('not_paid', 'partial')

form.div:
You have outstanding credits
listed below for this customer.

div.invisible: state != 'posted' or move_type not in ('in_invoice', 'in_receipt') or not invoice_has_outstanding or payment_state not in ('not_paid', 'partial')

form.div:
You have outstanding debits
listed below for this vendor.

div.invisible: state != 'posted' or move_type != 'out_refund' or not invoice_has_outstanding or payment_state not in ('not_paid', 'partial')

form.div:
You have outstanding debits
listed below for this customer.

div.invisible: state != 'posted' or move_type != 'in_refund' or not invoice_has_outstanding or payment_state not in ('not_paid', 'partial')

form.div:
You have outstanding credits
listed below for this vendor.

div.invisible: not display_inactive_currency_warning or move_type not in ('in_invoice', 'in_refund', 'in_receipt')

form.div: In order to validate this bill, you must activate the currency of the bill. The journal entries need to be computed by Odoo before being posted in your company's currency.

div.invisible: not display_inactive_currency_warning or move_type not in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'out_receipt')

form.div: In order to validate this invoice, you must activate the currency of the invoice. The journal entries need to be computed by Odoo before being posted in your company's currency.

button.name: action_view_business_doc
button.invisible: move_type != 'entry' or not id or not origin_payment_id

button.name: open_reconcile_view
button.invisible: move_type != 'entry' or not id or not has_reconciled_entries

widget.name: web_ribbon
widget.title: Sent
widget.invisible: not is_move_sent or payment_state != 'not_paid' or move_type not in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'out_receipt')

widget.name: web_ribbon
widget.tooltip: This entry has been generated through the Invoicing app, before installing Accounting. It has been disabled by the 'Invoicing Switch Threshold Date' setting so that it does not impact your accounting.

div.div: The current highest number is . You might want to put a higher number here.

field.name: partner_id
field.placeholder: Search a name or Tax ID...

button.name: action_update_fpos_values
button.help: Recompute all taxes and accounts based on this fiscal position

field.name: date
field.invisible: move_type in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'out_receipt') and not quick_edit_mode and not (state == 'posted' and date != invoice_date)

button.name: refresh_invoice_currency_rate
button.title: Reset the currency rate to the default accordingly to the invoice date

div.invisible: show_journal or state != 'draft' or invoice_currency_rate == expected_currency_rate

button.name: refresh_invoice_currency_rate
button.title: Reset the currency rate to the default accordingly to the invoice date

field.name: invoice_line_ids
field.context: { 'default_move_type': context.get('default_move_type'), 'journal_id': journal_id, 'default_partner_id': commercial_partner_id, 'default_currency_id': currency_id or company_currency_id, 'default_display_type': 'product', 'quick_encoding_vals': quick_encoding_vals, }

field.name: product_id
field.domain: context.get('default_move_type') in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'out_receipt') and [('sale_ok', '=', True)] or [('purchase_ok', '=', True)]

field.name: account_id
field.context: { 'partner_id': partner_id, 'move_type': parent.move_type, 'search_default_type_asset_fixed': 'in_' in parent.move_type, 'search_default_type_expense': 'in_' in parent.move_type, 'search_default_type_expense_direct_cost': 'in_' in parent.move_type, 'search_default_account_type': 'out_' in parent.move_type and 'income', 'preferred_account_type': 'out_' in parent.move_type and 'income' or 'in_' in parent.move_type and 'expense', }

field.name: analytic_distribution
field.business_domain_compute: parent.move_type in ['out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'out_receipt'] and 'invoice' or parent.move_type in ['in_invoice', 'in_refund', 'in_receipt'] and 'bill' or 'general'

field.name: tax_totals
field.readonly: state != 'draft' or (move_type not in ('in_invoice', 'in_refund', 'in_receipt') and not quick_edit_mode)

field.name: line_ids
field.context: { 'default_move_type': context.get('default_move_type'), 'line_ids': line_ids, 'journal_id': journal_id, 'default_partner_id': commercial_partner_id, 'default_currency_id': currency_id or company_currency_id, 'kanban_view_ref': 'account.account_move_line_view_kanban_mobile', }

field.name: analytic_distribution
field.business_domain_compute: parent.move_type in ['out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'out_receipt'] and 'invoice' or parent.move_type in ['in_invoice', 'in_refund', 'in_receipt'] and 'bill' or 'general'

field.name: tax_ids
field.readonly: display_type in ('line_section', 'line_note') or tax_line_id or (parent.move_type in ('out_invoice', 'out_refund', 'in_invoice', 'in_refund', 'out_receipt', 'in_receipt') and account_type in ('asset_receivable', 'liability_payable'))

div.span: This entry has been generated through the Invoicing app, before installing Accounting. Its balance has been imported separately.

field.name: invoice_source_email
field.invisible: move_type not in ('in_invoice', 'in_refund') or not invoice_source_email

field.name: help
field.p: A journal entry consists of several journal items, each of which is either a debit or a credit transaction.

field.name: help
field.p: This view shows only the journal entries that were selected from another context, such as for sending by email or reviewing a batch of records.

field.name: help
field.p: Create invoices, register payments and keep track of the discussions with your customers.

field.name: help
field.p: Create invoices, register payments and keep track of the discussions with your customers.

field.name: help
field.p: Note that the easiest way to create a credit note is to do it directly from the customer invoice.

field.name: help
field.p: Capture invoices, register payments and keep track of the discussions with your vendors.

field.name: help
field.p: Capture invoices, register payments and keep track of the discussions with your vendors.

field.name: help
field.p: Note that the easiest way to create a vendor credit note is to do it directly from the vendor bill.

field.name: help
field.p: Note that the easiest way to create a credit note is to do it directly from the customer invoice.
